summary: NASA's OSIRIS-REx mission found asteroid Bennu has a rugged surface covered in large boulders, defying expectations. Scientists had struggled to understand this surprise until now.

summary: NASA invites media to learn about upcoming X-59 test flights, set to take place after completing its second flight in California.
